message:
fix(widgets): refine mouse handling and simulator test support

- scrollbar.rs: simplify handle_mouse match arms and improve track
  position calculation for proportional scrollbar jumping
- tree.rs: fix off-by-one in expand/collapse toggle detection and
  align handle_mouse return types with MouseResult enum
- chrome.rs: minor help overlay rendering refinement
- simulator.rs: add mouse event injection support for headless testing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
